zh.lifeSummary: 當Samuel Pettypool Poole於1591年2月出生在美國密西根州門羅倫敦 堂史普倫敦時，他的父親John Pettypoole13歲，母親Elizabeth Strondall13歲。他於1627年9月19日與Alice Jackson在英國英格蘭米德萊可斯特普尼聖 登斯坦 安德 哥吉拉 沙智 邱奇結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1667年9月19日在英國英格蘭倫敦斯特普尼享年76歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可斯特普尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Samuel Pettypool Poole于1591年2月出生在美国密歇根州門羅倫敦 堂史普倫敦时，他的父亲John Pettypoole13岁，母亲Elizabeth Strondall13岁。他于1627年9月19日与Alice Jackson在英国英格兰米德萊可斯特普尼聖 登斯坦 安德 哥吉拉 沙智 邱奇结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1667年9月19日在英国英格兰倫敦斯特普尼享年76岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可斯特普尼。

nameMeanings.name: Poole
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English pol(e), polle, poul(e) ‘pool, pond’ (Old English pōl). The name may be topographic, for someone who lived by a pool, or habitative, from a place so named.
Possibly an Americanized form of German Puhl or Pfuhl(e) (see Pool 4).

variants.name: Pool
meanings: English: variant of   Poole   or   Paul  .
Jewish (from the Netherlands) and Dutch: ethnic name for someone from Poland.

variants.name: Pooler
meanings: English (Shropshire and Staffordshire): topographic name for someone who lived near a pool, or a habitational name for someone from a place called with this word (see   Poole  ).
Americanized form of French   Poulin   ‘young animal, colt’.
In some cases also an Americanized form of German Pfuhler, a variant of Pfuhl + -er, suffix denoting an inhabitant.

variants.name: Paul
meanings: English, French, German, Dutch, Swedish, West Indian (mainly Haiti, also e.g. Saint Lucia), and African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania): from the personal name Paul (from Latin Paulus ‘small’), which has always been popular in Christendom. It was the name adopted by the Pharisee Saul of Tarsus after his conversion to Christianity on the road to Damascus in about AD 34. He was a most energetic missionary to the Gentiles in the Roman Empire, and played a very significant role in establishing Christianity as a major world religion. The name was borne also by numerous other early Christian saints. It is also occasionally borne by Jews; the reasons for this are not clear. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages and their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Greek Pavlis , Slovenian Pavel and Pavlič (see Pavlic ), Polish Paweł (see Pawel ) and Pawlicki , Assyrian/Chaldean Polous and Polus . In France, this surname is most common in Brittany (see 2 below).
Breton (mainly Finistère): from a Frenchified form of the personal name Paol, Breton form of Paul .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Phóil ‘son of Paul’. Compare McFall .

nameMeanings.name: Samuel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (Hebrew Shemuel), possibly meaning ‘He (God) has hearkened’ (presumably to the prayers of a mother for a son). It may also be understood as a contracted form of Hebrew sha'ulme'el meaning ‘asked of God’. In the case of Samuel the son of Hannah, this would be more in keeping with his mother's statement ‘Because I have asked him of the Lord’ (1 Samuel 1:20). Living in the 11th century bc , Samuel was a Hebrew judge and prophet of the greatest historical importance, who established the Hebrew monarchy, anointing as king both Saul and, later, David. In the Authorized Version two books of the Old Testament are named after him, although in Roman Catholic and Orthodox versions of the Bible they are known as the first and second Book of Kings. The story of Samuel being called by God while still a child serving in the house of Eli the priest (1 Samuel 3) is of great vividness and has moved countless generations. In England and America the name was particularly popular among the 16th-century Puritans and among Nonconformists from the 17th to the 19th century. It became fashionable again in the 1990s.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Samuel Pettypool Poole was born in February 1591, in London, London Township, Monroe, Michigan, United States, his father, John Pettypoole, was 13 and his mother, Elizabeth Strondall, was 13. He married Alice Jackson on 19 September 1627, in Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 19 September 1667, in Stepney, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76, and was buried in Stepney, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Samuel Pettypool Poole est né en février 1591, à London, London Township, Monroe, Michigan, États-Unis, son père, John Pettypoole, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Strondall, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Alice Jackson le 19 septembre 1627, à Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 19 septembre 1667, à Stepney, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Stepney, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Samuel Pettypool Poole im Februar 1591 in London, London Township, Monroe, Michigan, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Pettypoole 13 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Strondall 13. Er hat am 19. September 1627 in Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom Alice Jackson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 19. September 1667 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Stepney, London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Stepney, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Samuel Pettypool Poole è nato il nel febbraio 1591 nel London, London Township, Monroe, Michigan, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, John Pettypoole, aveva 13 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Strondall, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Alice Jackson il 19 settembre 1627, nel Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 19 settembre 1667, nel Stepney, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Stepney, Middlesex, England.

ja.Saint Dunstan,Stepney,London,England: イギリスイギリスロンドンステプニーサイント ダンスタン アンド アル サインツ チャーチ
ja.lifeSummary: Samuel Pettypool Pooleが1591年2月にアメリカ合衆国ミシガン州モンローロンドン トウンシュイップロンドンで生まれた時，父John Pettypooleは13歳，母Elizabeth Strondallは13歳であった。1627年9月19日にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスステプニーサイント ダンスタン アンド アル サインツ チャーチでAlice Jacksonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1667年9月19日にイギリスイギリスロンドンステプニーで76歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスステプニーにて埋葬された。

ko.St Dunstan and All Saints, Stepney, Midd: 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 스테p니 세인트 던스탠 앤드 앨 세인츠 c후르치
ko.London, London, England: 미국 미시간 주 먼로 런던 타운시프 런던
ko.St Dunstan, Stepney, Middlesex, England: 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 스테p니 세인트 던스탠 앤드 앨 세인츠 c후르치
ko.Ratcliff, Middlesex, England: 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 라트c리프 스트 자메스
ko.Saint Dunstan,Stepney,London,England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스테p니 세인트 던스탠 앤드 앨 세인츠 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Samuel Pettypool Poole(이)가 1591년 2월 미국 미시간 주 먼로 런던 타운시프 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Pettypoole(은)는 13세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Strondall(은)는 13세였다. 그는 1627년 9월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 스테p니 세인트 던스탠 앤드 앨 세인츠 c후르치에서 Alice Jackson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1667년 9월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스테p니에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 스테p니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Samuel Pettypool Poole nasceu em fevereiro de 1591, em London, London Township, Monroe, Michigan, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, John Pettypoole, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Strondall, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Jackson em 19 de setembro de 1627, em Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de setembro de 1667, em Stepney, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Stepney, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Samuel Pettypool Poole родился февраль 1591 г. в местности лондон, лондон тоуншип, монро, Мичиган, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени John Pettypoole было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Strondall, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Jackson 19 сентября 1627 г. в местности сеинт дунстань анд алл сеинц чурч, степни, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 19 сентября 1667 г. в местности степни, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности степни, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Samuel Pettypool Poole nació en febrero de 1591, en London, London Township, Monroe, Michigan, Estados Unidos, su papá, John Pettypoole, tenía 13 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Strondall, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Alice Jackson el 19 de septiembre de 1627, en Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 19 de septiembre de 1667, en Stepney, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Stepney, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
